\tzpentry{ID5917}{Donut Holes Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5917 introduces Donut Holes Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} x &= (R + r\cos\theta_1)\cos\theta_2 \\ y &= (R + r\cos\theta_1)\sin\theta_2 \\ z &= r\sin\theta_1 \end{align}
